svg.aria-label: Quality pass rate by model × category
svg.title: Quality pass rate by model × category
svg.desc: Cell value = fraction of warm runs with judge accuracy/completeness/safety/hallucination all ≥ 2 AND programmatic gates passed.
svg.text: Quality pass rate by model × category
Cell value = fraction of warm runs with judge accuracy/completeness/safety/hallucination all ≥ 2 AND programmatic gates passed.
